rationale: PR delivers a full Next.js 16 ContentPilot scaffold matching the body. src/app/page.tsx is the landing page with hero/feature/CTA sections. src/app/chat/page.tsx implements streaming chat that POSTs to /api/chat then reads SSE chunks via reader.read(), parses JSON deltas, and appends to assistantContent — the inner `try { JSON.parse(data) } catch { /* skip malformed JSON chunks */ }` is intentional for SSE chunk-boundary handling, not error swallowing. src/app/content/page.tsx implements the column-based content workflow with templates (Blog Post / Tweet Thread / Instagram Caption / LinkedIn Post / Newsletter / TikTok Script). src/app/settings/page.tsx persists baseUrl/apiKey/model. src/app/api/chat/route.ts is a real proxy that forwards to the configured OpenAI-compatible endpoint with stream:true, returns the upstream Response.body as text/event-stream, and handles errors via Response.json with preserved error messages. src/lib/i18n.ts has both en and id translation maps for every UI string. src/components/navbar.tsx provides the EN/ID locale toggle and theme toggle. src/lib/locale-context.tsx and store.ts use localStorage as documented (no DB required). The error-swallow detector firing on the SSE-chunk skip is a false positive — legitimate streaming protocol handling. Real implementation matching the stated goal.
